name: general_video
description: Generate a 10-second AI video from a text prompt using Kling 3.0. Optionally provide reference images for style guidance. Supports custom aspect ratios and pro/standard quality modes.

prompt.description: Text description of the video to generate

image_urls.description: Optional reference image URLs for style guidance

mode.description: Quality mode: pro (higher quality) or std (faster). Default: pro

sound.description: Whether to generate with sound. Default: true
